parsed_denial_summary: Synthetic denial states safety screening was not attached to the prior authorization submission.

rescue_strategy.rationale: Policy Section 3.2 requires recent TB and hepatitis screening before biologic initiation.
requested_actions: If artifact-safety-labs is present, include it in the appeal packet with citation policy-citation-safety.
If artifact-safety-labs is missing, route to Missing Evidence Agent before drafting.

unsupported_claim_warnings: Do not claim safety screening is recent unless mapping-safety-screen remains found and artifact-safety-labs is attached.
audit_summary: Denial Rescue Agent mapped denial SAFETY_SCREEN_MISSING to the safety_screen rescue strategy.
